heading: Production AI plus audit-grade governance — by the same person
subhead: Most AI projects fail in the gap between innovation lab and regulated enterprise. I run AI inside Tier-1 financial services and telecom — fast enough to ship, careful enough to pass audit. No handoff gap between strategy, delivery, and compliance.

approach.title: Cut EUR 500k+ in license spend
approach.desc: Merged 3 enterprise processes and retired legacy tooling at NTT Ltd. — savings hit the P&L in the same fiscal year.

approach.title: Run SAP S/4HANA ↔ PEGA moves
approach.desc: Future-state design, rating & metering standardization, variable billing operationalization at S.W.I.F.T. and NTT Ltd.

approach.title: Ship AI inside regulated workflows
approach.desc: 60% documentation-time savings at SWIFT via Claude Code + MCP source-code analysis. AI documentation that engineering, product and audit all signed off without rework.

approach.title: Keep audit and compliance intact
approach.desc: EU AI Act fluent. Govern AI shipping with model risk lineage, transparency obligations, and conformity assessment baked in — not bolted on.
